name: Video Broadcast

notes.en: Tap Start broadcasting to go live with your camera and mic. Tap Mute, Camera off, or Flip camera to control your own stream.

multiplayer.notes: Full-mesh WebRTC: every browser connects directly to every other browser's RTCPeerConnection and adds its own camera/mic tracks. The ogh-net WebSocket room relay only ever carries SDP/ICE signaling and small media-state (mute/camera-off) messages, never video or audio.

notes: No STUN/TURN configured — peers on the same LAN room connect with host ICE candidates only. Camera/mic access requires a secure context (HTTPS or localhost); a plain-HTTP LAN page can still receive/watch broadcasts but cannot send its own. Full mesh scales to roughly 4-6 simultaneous broadcasters on typical phones/laptops before CPU/bandwidth strain — there is intentionally no media relay/SFU server.
